creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
Tried again now and it is not reproducible on main.

$ dialog --version
Version: 1.3-20210117

This version is in 14.0 and later but was not merged to 13.

(At least) these three commits are needed in 13:

ec74116ace52591cf121623e2010ae5efab5524a
